features_extracted: Welcome page with quick action CTAs
Dashboard with 4 metric cards (Total, Scheduled, Completed, Prescriptions)
Book consultation form (patient name, age, gender, department, doctor, mode, date, time, symptoms)
My Consultations list with filter (All/Requested/Scheduled/In Consultation/Completed/Cancelled) and search (patient/doctor/department)
Status update per consultation (Requested → Scheduled → Completed)
Prescription summary (Available for Completed, Pending otherwise)
Demo prescription fields: Doctor Advice, Medication Notes, Follow-up Recommendation
Sign out with session clear and login redirect
conflict_reason: BRD Section 14 mandates Streamlit. However, all 7 embedded mockups depict a sidebar-nav React/Next.js-style web application with metric dashboards, data cards, status badges, and split-screen login. Streamlit cannot reproduce this layout without heavy custom component wrappers. The user invoked NoCode2ProCode (production pro-code pipeline), which per genesis policy blocks prototype-only stacks unless explicitly overridden.
confidence_basis: Full BRD text extracted, all 8 figures extracted and analyzed, all tables extracted, no ambiguity in business logic
